# mcp Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [AdjacencyList Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-graph-cache-ts-adjacencylist.html): Architecture documentation for the AdjacencyList type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [AnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-analysistools.html): The logic specific to different code exploration strategies, including symbol lookup, call-graph traversal, and architectural overviews. Architectural overview of the AnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.
- [ArchiveManager — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-archivemanager.html): Recursive directory walker for ZIP creation with standard exclusions Architecture documentation for the ArchiveManager subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [CacheEntry Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-graph-cache-ts-cacheentry.html): Architecture documentation for the CacheEntry type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [CallGraphTraversal — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-callgraphtraversal.html): BFS logic for navigating caller/callee relationships across domains Architecture documentation for the CallGraphTraversal subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ClientContext Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-clientcontext.html): Architecture documentation for the ClientContext type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ContentBlock Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-contentblock.html): Architecture documentation for the ContentBlock type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [DomainInfo Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-explore-function-ts-domaininfo.html): Architecture documentation for the DomainInfo type/interface in explore-function.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [Endpoint Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-endpoint.html): Architecture documentation for the Endpoint type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ErrorClassifier — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-errorclassifier.html): Maps HTTP and Network errors to domain-specific structured errors Architecture documentation for the ErrorClassifier subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ErrorType Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-errortype.html): Architecture documentation for the ErrorType type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [GraphCache Class — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/class-graph-cache-ts-graphcache.html): Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [GraphCache Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-graphcache.html): A specialized LRU and disk-based caching system for storing indexed representations of codebases to ensure sub-second tool responses. Architectural overview of the GraphCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [HandlerFunction Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-handlerfunction.html): Architecture documentation for the HandlerFunction type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [IdentityGenerator — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-identitygenerator.html): Calculates SHA1 hashes of paths and git status for caching Architecture documentation for the IdentityGenerator subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [IndexedGraph Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-graph-cache-ts-indexedgraph.html): Architecture documentation for the IndexedGraph type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-mcpserver.html): The entry point and orchestration layer that implements the Model Context Protocol to expose code analysis tools to AI clients. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.
- [OverviewRenderer — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-overviewrenderer.html): Generates high-level architectural summaries from domain indexes Architecture documentation for the OverviewRenderer subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [PathIndexEntry Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-graph-cache-ts-pathindexentry.html): Architecture documentation for the PathIndexEntry type/interface in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [PersistenceManager — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-persistencemanager.html): Handles file-system I/O for .json cache files Architecture documentation for the PersistenceManager subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ProgressState Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-zip-repository-ts-progressstate.html): Architecture documentation for the ProgressState type/interface in zip-repository.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [RepositoryUtility Domain — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-repositoryutility.html): Handles raw filesystem operations and repository preparation for remote analysis. Architectural overview of the RepositoryUtility domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.
- [Server Class — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/class-server-ts-server.html): Architecture documentation for the Server class in server.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ServerOptions Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-server-ts-serveroptions.html): Architecture documentation for the ServerOptions type/interface in server.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [SessionContext — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-sessioncontext.html): Manages request-scoped data like the current working directory Architecture documentation for the SessionContext subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [StructuredError Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-structurederror.html): Architecture documentation for the StructuredError type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [SymbolFinder — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-symbolfinder.html): Logic for resolving Class.method and partial name matches Architecture documentation for the SymbolFinder subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ToolCallResult Type — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/type-types-ts-toolcallresult.html): Architecture documentation for the ToolCallResult type/interface in types.ts from the mcp codebase.
- [ToolRegistration — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-toolregistration.html): Maps internal handlers to MCP tool definitions Architecture documentation for the ToolRegistration subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [TransportLayer — mcp Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-transportlayer.html): Handles Stdio communication with the host application Architecture documentation for the TransportLayer subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
